text_sections: Easily integrate ERPNext with Zötok to automate financial data sync, invoices, and ledgers in real-time.
A trusted Indian SMS gateway offering bulk SMS, transactional SMS, and OTP delivery with full DLT compliance. Connect your account to send reliable, secure text messages directly to your customers.
Securely connect your applications to Zötok with comprehensive API access for smooth data exchange.
Download the ZoSync tool for seamless custom sync between your local files and the Zötok platform.

Google Sheets is a free, cloud-based spreadsheet application that allows users to create, edit, and collaborate on data in real-time. Accessible on any device via a web browser or mobile app, it features robust formulas, automated visualizations, and seamless Microsoft Excel compatibility
